item.title: Don’t Get Sucked Into the War on Lice
item.dc:creator: Daniel Engber

item.title: Marc Andreessen’s Mistake
item.description: The ability to understand, recognize, and label your own emotions is a necessary part of living a fulfilling life.
item.dc:creator: David Brooks

item.title: Photos From the Third Nationwide ‘No Kings’ Protest
item.description: More than 3,000 marches and rallies took place yesterday in cities and towns across America during the third “No Kings” event, where millions protested against the policies and actions of President Trump and his administration.
item.dc:creator: Alan Taylor

item.title: The Kurdish Ground Force Preparing to Fight in Iran
item.description: The Peshmerga on the Iraq-Iran border are eager to join the American campaign. They’re also deeply uneasy about where it might lead.
item.dc:creator: Robert F. Worth

item.title: The Manosphere Turns on Trump
item.description: How many times can a coalition crack before it shatters?
item.dc:creator: Elaine Godfrey

item.title: The Man Who Thought He Could Keep AI Safe
item.description: Demis Hassabis has devoted his life to advancing a technology he thinks could destroy the world.
item.dc:creator: Sebastian Mallaby

item.title: The Bill Maher Effect
item.description: For the past year, Donald Trump has made the Kennedy Center all about him. Last night, the comedian revealed the limits of that approach.
item.dc:creator: Jonathan L. Fischer

item.title: Trump’s Mixed Messages About Iran
item.description: Panelists joined to discuss the president’s shifting answers to how the conflict could end.
item.dc:creator: The Editors

item.title: Mutually Assured Energy Destruction
item.description: Wrecking oil infrastructure is easy; rebuilding it is hard.
item.dc:creator: Graeme Wood

item.title: How to Wait Without Getting Bored
item.description: What if we thought about waiting in line as a sudden opening of time?
item.dc:creator: Isabel Fattal

item.title: The Sneaky-Saver Generation
item.description: Gen Z may have a Peter Pan reputation—but it’s also saving a lot of money.
item.dc:creator: Faith Hill

item.title: America’s Raw-Cheddar Chaos
item.description: The FDA has linked anE. Colioutbreak to contaminated cheese. The company that makes it refuses to agree to a recall.
item.dc:creator: Nicholas Florko

item.title: Nick Fuentes’s Strategy is Working
item.description: Viral clips of the far-right white supremacist are growing his audience.
item.dc:creator: Amogh Dimri

item.title: Airfare Is Just the Beginning
item.description: Expensive plane tickets are a preview of what could come next.
item.dc:creator: Will Gottsegen

item.title: Today’sAtlanticTrivia: Chinese Science
item.description: Test your knowledge—and read our stories for a little extra help.
item.dc:creator: Drew Goins

item.title: Let a Book Annoy You
item.description: Sometimes, an angry note in the margin can be an expression of love.
item.dc:creator: Emma Sarappo

item.title: The Worst-Case Scenario for AI and the News Is Already Here
item.description: Audiovisual evidence is no match for a viral conspiracy theory that Benjamin Netanyahu is dead.
item.dc:creator: Yair Rosenberg

item.title: What Is Twitter’s Legacy, 20 Years Later?
item.description: An early Twitter exec reckons with the monster he helped create.
item.dc:creator: Charlie Warzel

item.title: A Day in Class With Plato, the Melania Trump–Mandated Robot Teacher
item.description: The first lady told us to imagine a future of humanoid instruction … so I did.
item.dc:creator: Alexandra Petri
